summary: Completed testing of Bakhoor Coming Soon products and trust badge updates. All 10 features verified successfully. Backend returns 7 products with 2 marked comingSoon=true. Cart add correctly blocks coming-soon products with 400 error. Frontend displays Coming Soon badges, correct prices (₹249 and ₹399), and hides rating stars for 0-review products. Product detail pages show 'Coming Soon — Stay Tuned!' instead of Add to Cart. Trust badges updated to 'Ethical Sourcing / Premium Ingredients'.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bakhoor Coming Soon feature fully functional. Two new products (grated-omani-bakhoor at ₹249 and yemeni-bakhoor-chips at ₹399) are marked comingSoon=true in products.py. These products display 'Coming Soon' badge on homepage, cannot be added to cart (400 error), and show 'Coming Soon — Stay Tuned!' on product detail pages instead of Add to Cart button. Trust badges on all product pages now show 'Ethical Sourcing / Premium Ingredients' instead of old 'Natural Ingredients / 100% Pure'.
